name: How SMB Marketing Teams Can Save Time with Email - 9 tips
description: Learn 9 practical strategies to maximize email results without sacrificing valuable time. Streamline workflows with automated emails, generate click-worthy subject lines with AI, and optimize timing with automated scheduling.
main_title: 9 Tips for SMB Marketing Teams to Save Time with Email
richtext:
If you're involved in email marketing for a small business, achieving great results isn't easy when time and resources are limited. Whether you handle email campaigns solo or as part of a small team, the pressure to accomplish more with less can seem impossible.

However, with some smart time-saving techniques, you can streamline your email campaigns and work more efficiently. This, in turn, allows your emails to make a bigger impact on your business.

To help you work smarter, here are nine practical strategies to maximize email results without sacrificing valuable time.

‍

Streamline Workflows with Automated Emails

Setting up automated email sequences might seem intimidating, but even a basic three-step welcome series saves significant time in the long run. Automating emails eliminates the need for manual sends, freeing you up to focus on higher-level tasks.

Once you set it up, personalized welcome messages automatically launch after signup, seamlessly welcoming and nurturing new subscribers. The system handles sending based on your chosen schedule, allowing you to dedicate more time to crafting engaging campaigns and building valuable connections with your audience.

‍

Generate Click-Worthy Subject Lines with AI

Writing impactful subject lines can be time-consuming. Even with templates, you likely tweak them for each send or segment. Wouldn't it be easier to have AI-generated, optimized options at your fingertips?

Subject line generator tools now utilize machine learning to quickly output numerous high-converting phrases tailored to your content. When stuck on a subject line, simply browse the data-driven suggestions and choose the one that grabs your attention and resonates with your audience. No more racking your brain - just engaging subject lines driving opens and clicks.

‍

Boost Efficiency with Pre-Built Email Templates

Instead of starting from scratch each time, build a library of pre-made email templates for key categories like promotions, newsletters, and holiday offers.

These ready-to-go templates are already mobile-friendly and include relevant visuals, so you only need to update a few text paragraphs for each use. With a persistent framework in place, simply swap in new product information or offers. Drag, drop, and send professional emails in just a few clicks, maximizing your email marketing efficiency.

‍

Optimize Timing with Automated Scheduling

Tired of manually clicking "send" at an ideal time? Modern email platforms allow you to conveniently schedule emails in advance, ensuring your messages reach inboxes during peak activity periods.

Run A/B tests to discover your audience's peak engagement times, whether it's mid-morning Tuesdays or Friday afternoons. Scheduling emails for these times ensures your messages hit inboxes when subscriber activity is highest, maximizing their reach and impact. This eliminates the risk of sending emails during low engagement periods, preventing wasted visibility.

‍

Streamline Email Signups with Smart Forms

Manually adding new subscribers to your list is time-consuming. Instead, capture leads with strategically placed signup forms on your website and social media channels.

Place email signup forms on high-traffic pages using an automated popup tool. Direct social media followers to an identical subscription box. New contacts will then automatically populate your mailing list without repetitive manual entry or follow-up paperwork. You can save a lot of development time by opting to use a form-builder like Tally Forms or Jotform or Typeform.

‍

Simplify Onboarding with Automated Sequences

Automating signup forms is clearly valuable, but an overly complex follow-up sequence defeats the purpose. Instead, use pre-built email sequences that are sent gradually after sign-up. This keeps people engaged without overwhelming them.

Greet new subscribers with a warm welcome email when they sign up. Then, set up automated emails with helpful product tips delivered every few days. This provides new users with constant value through relevant content, freeing you to focus on crafting great content instead of managing individual sends.

‍

Personalize Emails with CRM Integration

Creating personalized email experiences is crucial, but manually segmenting your audience can be time-consuming. By connecting your email tool to your customer relationship management (CRM) platform, you can automatically create targeted segments, saving you time and effort.

For example, if you want to reach out to product managers in tech, just click to assemble that email group. The CRM already knows the industries and roles of your contacts, so there's no tedious manual filtering. All the customer data is organized in one place within your CRM, making it easy to build personalized email lists in just a few clicks.

‍

Repurpose Landing Page Content

Creating new content for every email strains resources. However, your high-performing landing pages already hold valuable content you can repurpose for future emails. Simply export relevant sections from key pages into complementary campaigns targeting subscribers aligned with that content.

For example, pull bullet points and details on product benefits from an ecommerce category page into emails targeting subscribers who previously purchased related items. Or take the website text that talks about email signup benefits and use it in automated welcome emails.

Reusing your best landing page content for emails saves time having to brainstorm ideas and write new copy from scratch. It also makes sure website visitors and email subscribers see consistent messaging about your products or services.

‍

Gain Insights with Email Surveys

Short email surveys make it easy to collect direct feedback from your audience. By asking focused questions about things like preferred content types or product needs, you'll gain insights to help you create emails that really connect.

Luckily, creating these surveys is easier than ever with various email survey builder tools. You can build a quick questionnaire in no time and send it out to your subscribers with a single click.

‍

Power Up Email Marketing with Smarter Strategies

As an email marketer, you have access to numerous tools and technologies. However, it's by implementing time-saving strategies that you unlock email's full potential. By streamlining a few key processes, you can maximize reach, optimize send times, and foster deeper subscriber relationships.

The key is pinpointing any inefficient tools or workflows that cause bottlenecks. Replace those with approaches and systems that accelerate content creation, heighten message impact, and simplify campaign administration. By optimizing your approach this way, you can ensure email remains a top performing channel, fueling your organization's growth for years to come.
